articles.title: Revolut delists Cardano, Polygon, and Solana in US market
articles.description: in an email sent to U.S.-based users on June 28, U.K. fintech firm Revolut announced that it is ending support for three major cryptocurrencies. The company stated that U.S. users will not be able to buy Cardano (ADA), Polygon (MATIC), and Solana (SOL) through its app, effective immediately. At a later, unspecified date, users will […] The post Revolut delists Cardano, Polygon, and Solana in US market appeared first on CryptoSlate.

articles.title: Cardano Shows Signs of Recovery: When Will it Reach $0.30?
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) has shown signs of recovery in recent trading sessions, although its price continues to linger near a significant resistance level. In the past 24 hours, ADA witnessed a modest 2% increase, but weekly gains have been erased, resulting in a 7% depreciation on the weekly chart.
